description: Create k6 load test scripts for chat fanout, feed ranking, and search scenarios plus security scanning configs (OWASP ZAP + Snyk)
steps: Create packages/testing/src/load/index.ts - Export all load test configurations and scripts.

Create packages/testing/src/load/chat-fanout.ts - k6 load test script config for chat message fanout: (1) scenario definition with ramping VUs (0->50 over 30s, hold 50 for 2m, ramp down), (2) thresholds (p95 < 500ms, error rate < 1%), (3) test function that simulates sending messages to group chat and verifying delivery to all members.

Create packages/testing/src/load/feed-ranking.ts - k6 load test script config for feed ranking: (1) scenario with constant VUs (100 users for 3m), (2) thresholds (p95 < 1000ms, p99 < 2000ms, error rate < 0.5%), (3) test function that fetches personalized feed, scrolls through pages, interacts with posts.

Create packages/testing/src/load/search.ts - k6 load test script config for search: (1) scenario with ramping arrival rate (0->200 req/s over 1m, hold for 2m), (2) thresholds (p95 < 300ms, p99 < 800ms, error rate < 0.1%), (3) test function that performs full-text search, filters results, and paginate.
Create packages/testing/src/load/types.ts - TypeScript types for K6ScriptConfig, K6Scenario, K6Threshold, K6Stage, LoadTestDefinition.

Create k6/ directory at project root with: k6/chat-fanout.js (JavaScript k6 script using the config from packages/testing), k6/feed-ranking.js, k6/search.js. These are the actual k6-compatible scripts that reference the config.
Create packages/testing/src/security/index.ts - Export security scanning configurations.

Create packages/testing/src/security/owasp-zap.ts - OWASP ZAP configuration: target URLs for each app, active scan policies, spider config, alerting thresholds (no high-severity findings allowed), authentication config template.
Create packages/testing/src/security/snyk.ts - Snyk configuration: project manifest paths for all packages, severity threshold (high), auto-fix policy, ignore patterns, license compliance config.
Create packages/testing/src/security/types.ts - Types for ZAPConfig, ZAPScanPolicy, SnykConfig, SnykPolicy, SecurityScanResult.

Create packages/testing/src/__tests__/load-scripts.test.ts - Tests that: (1) all 3 load scripts have valid scenarios, (2) thresholds are properly defined, (3) chat fanout targets correct endpoints, (4) feed ranking uses correct VU count, (5) search uses arrival rate pattern.

Create packages/testing/src/__tests__/security-config.test.ts - Tests that: (1) ZAP config targets all apps, (2) Snyk config lists all package manifests, (3) severity thresholds are enforced, (4) configs are valid objects.
Update packages/testing/src/index.ts to export load and security modules.
acceptance_criteria: k6/ directory has 3 JavaScript load test scripts
packages/testing/src/load/ has typed configs for chat-fanout, feed-ranking, search
Each load test has scenarios with stages/VUs and thresholds
packages/testing/src/security/ has OWASP ZAP and Snyk configurations
Security configs are comprehensive (target all apps, proper thresholds)
Load and security tests pass: NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run packages/testing/src/__tests__/load-scripts.test.ts packages/testing/src/__tests__/security-config.test.ts
findings: All 16 tests pass (8 load-scripts + 8 security-config). New TypeScript files compile cleanly with strict mode. Pre-existing core/ TS errors remain unchanged. Prettier ran via lint-staged and reformatted files successfully. k6/ scripts are plain JS for k6 runtime compatibility.
